findings.title: Tourist stay duration conflicts with official guidance
findings.detail: Official tourist guidance states a 90-day stay that may be extended once for another 90 days, not a standard 180-day initial stay.
findings.recommendedAction: Change tourist-entry copy to 90 days plus one 90-day extension where applicable.

findings.title: Healthcare access claim may be outdated after 2025 reform
findings.detail: Post-reform guidance indicates foreign visitors and many non-permanent statuses should rely on insurance or paid services rather than assuming free public healthcare access.
findings.recommendedAction: Re-verify healthcare access language against the 2025 reform guidance before using it in site copy.

findings.title: Digital nomad residency pathway claim needs verification
findings.detail: The current official digital nomad page does not present the visa itself as a direct permanent residency or citizenship track.
findings.recommendedAction: Reframe this as a visa-switch strategy unless you can cite a current official source confirming direct countability toward permanent residency.

findings.title: Digital nomad duration conflicts with official guidance
findings.detail: Official Migraciones guidance currently describes a 180-day transitory residence with one additional 180-day extension, not a 12+12 month stay.
findings.recommendedAction: Rewrite duration and renewal language to 180 days plus one 180-day extension unless a newer official resolution supersedes it.

findings.detail: The current Migraciones naturalization baseline uses temporary or permanent residence plus two years of continuous and legal residence, not a separate two-year permanent-residency clock or a fixed four-year formula.

findings.title: Digital nomad duration conflicts with official guidance
findings.detail: Official Migraciones guidance currently describes a 180-day transitory residence with one additional 180-day extension, not a 12+12 month stay.
findings.recommendedAction: Rewrite duration and renewal language to 180 days plus one 180-day extension unless a newer official resolution supersedes it.

findings.title: Digital nomad residency pathway claim needs verification
findings.detail: The current official digital nomad page does not present the visa itself as a direct permanent residency or citizenship track.
findings.recommendedAction: Reframe this as a visa-switch strategy unless you can cite a current official source confirming direct countability toward permanent residency.

findings.title: Public-university tuition claim conflicts with 2025 reform baseline
findings.detail: The current public reform baseline says state universities may charge non-permanent residents, so broad free-tuition claims for all foreigners or all DNI holders need review.
findings.recommendedAction: Reframe higher-education language around the current institution-by-status baseline instead of assuming universal free tuition.
